source.name: Chapter 1.4: 6.4 Knowledge Check - why collect order matters
source.instructions: **Why is the order of `collect:` steps in the flow important?**

answers.answer: It doesn't matter; Rasa collects them in any order
The order determines the order in which the agent asks the user for each value
The first collect step must always be amount
Only the last collect step is used by the action

source.learningObjectives: SWBAT explain why collect step order matters
source.guidance: The order of `collect:` steps is the order in which the agent prompts the user for each value.
